title: POS Sync API — GET /api/pos/v1/commands, POST /api/pos/v1/commands/:id/ack (real SBG Lite POS Android contract §6, 2026-07-04)

ForbiddenCommandType.description: Must never appear in a real response — listed here only so validators/tests can assert these are rejected. See POS_SYNC_API.md §15. Not exhaustive: any command type that would create a receipt/payment/refund/fiscal operation is forbidden by principle, not just by this enumerated list.

CommandListResponse.description: Deliberately flat — no `data` wrapper, no `requestId` — matching the real contract's GET /commands response exactly (POS_SYNC_API.md §15), unlike every other pos-sync success response in this repo.

processedAtMs.description: Epoch milliseconds. Accepted, not persisted as its own column — see schema.prisma CloudCommand.

CommandAckResponse.description: Not specified by the source contract for this endpoint — this Cloud's own choice, same flat ack shape as fiscal/shift events.
